feed.title: Dialectologia et Geolinguistica...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Dialectologia et Geolinguistica... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: The Genesis of Colonial American English Phonology. Dialect Mixture or Koineization?
entry.summary: Authors: Gary Manchec German DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dialect-2025-0001 Pages: Page range: 1-42

entry.title: Spatial Data Infrastructure for the Lithuanian Language: Application of GIS Tools and Geospatial Analysis Methods in Language Perception Studies
entry.summary: Authors: Agnė Čepaitienė, Aidas Gudaitis, Danguolė Mikulėnienė DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dialect-2025-0002 Pages: Page range: 43-59

entry.title: The Evolution and Functions of Evidentials in dialects of Turkish
entry.summary: Authors: Melike Üzüm DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dialect-2025-0003 Pages: Page range: 61-90

entry.title: Latgalic: Dialect or Language ?
entry.summary: Authors: Anna Stafecka DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dialect-2025-0004 Pages: Page range: 91-102

entry.title: On the Name ‘Fleance’ in Shakespeare’s Macbeth
entry.summary: Authors: Watson Seosamh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dialect-2025-0005 Pages: Page range: 103-111

entry.title: A dialectometric approach to Modern Breton dialect data: an opportunity to shed light on its origins and historical evolution
entry.summary: Authors: Tanguy Solliec DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/dialect-2025-0006 Pages: Page range: 113-147

entry.title: Besprechungen – Comptes rendus – Reseñas – Reviews
